Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Pending Action
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GENEVA VENTURES, L.P., GENEVA GROUP INTERNATIONAL INC., GENEVA VENTURE PARTNERS II, L.P. Motion for Order to Compel Arbitration and To Stay the Pending Action. Appearances: Giacomo Russo, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 327-9800 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; John Kevin Crowley, Esq. of Tenebaum, Crowley & Brereton (408) 286-1200 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Defendant's to incur initial costs of getting into arbitration, without prejudice to the Issue being resolved in arbitration. (Defense counsel will prepare Order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Ann Mendoza CSR # 6812
